---
title: Slide Examples
subtitle: Quarto revealjs
author: Wolfgang Hönig
date: February, 2026
date-format: medium

format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: [white, media/custom.scss]
    slideNumber: 'c'
    auto-play-media: true
    # smaller: true
    hash-type: 'number'
    hash-one-based-index: true
revealjs-plugins:
  - pointer

title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: media/title_white.svg
    data-background-size: contain
---

# Section 1

## Lists

- Item1
- Item2
